summary: Pipeline List UI Visual Polish - All 11 features verified successfully via Playwright testing. All 7 refinements implemented correctly: (1) 24px logo containers with 18px inner logo, (2) 8px row padding, (3) CTA flex-start alignment with paddingTop:1, (4) Coming Up bg tint rgba(241,245,249,0.35), (5) Softer dividers rgba(226,232,240,0.6), (6) Owner tag 8px font/0.6 opacity, (7) 24px section gap. Interactive features also working: swipe gestures on HIGH/MED, collapsible On Track, Priority/Pipeline toggle.
critical_code_review_comments: LogoBox correctly implements 24x24px container with borderRadius:5, subtle bg rgb(241,245,249), and 18px inner logo
Row padding correctly set to 8px top/bottom for tighter density
CTA alignment uses flex-start with paddingTop:1 for first-line alignment
Coming Up section wrapped with rgba(241,245,249,0.35) bg, padding 10px 8px 6px, margin 0 -8px
Dividers use rgba(226,232,240,0.6) - softer than solid borders
OwnerTag component uses 8px font, rgba(13,148,136,0.6) color - smaller and less dominant
Priority board container uses gap:24px for uniform section spacing
Green dot in On Track: 4px size, 0.45 opacity - correctly implemented
SwipeableCard wraps HIGH(5) and MED(1) rows for swipe gestures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline list UI visual polish complete. All 7 refinements verified: LogoBox 24px container with 18px inner logo (down from 26px/20px), row padding 8px (down from 11px), CTA flex-start alignment, Coming Up subtle bg tint, softer dividers at 0.6 opacity, OwnerTag 8px font with 0.6 opacity colors, section gap 24px (down from 28px). Interactive features verified: swipe gestures on HIGH/MED rows, On Track collapsible toggle, Priority/Pipeline view toggle. Current data: 5 HIGH, 1 MED, 1 LOW.

verified_features.1_logo_24px_container: PASS - LogoBox 24x24px with borderRadius:5 and #f1f5f9 background
verified_features.2_inner_logo_18px: PASS - UniversityLogo size prop 18px, verified via computed style
verified_features.8_section_gap_24px: PASS - gap: 24px on priority-board flex container
verified_features.9_swipe_gestures: PASS - SwipeableCard wraps HIGH (5) and MED (1) rows
verified_features.10_on_track_collapsible: PASS - Toggle works, 1 row visible -> 0 rows after collapse
